pr_title: Define PR review packet contract and artifact envelope

summary.executive_summary: This packet defines the minimum shared contract, runtime artifact paths, and example fixture that future packet generators should follow.

changed_areas.impact: Adds explicit packet identifiers and artifact envelope guidance for machine consumers.
Adds a CI-checkable example fixture so later packet generators target one stable shape.

validation.evidence: scripts/check-pr-review-packet-contract.py validates required fields and artifact path conventions.

risks.note: Future packet generators may expand the contract before REQ-019 and REQ-020 land.
risks.mitigation: Keep changes additive and update the example fixture in the same PR.

reviewer_checklist: Confirm linked REQ and ADR identifiers use canonical formats.
Confirm artifact paths stay under artifacts/pr-review-packets/pr-<number>/.
Confirm reviewer prose lives in summary while validation, risks, and visuals stay typed.
